name: @botcoin/cortex-server
description: Standalone HTTP process serving /v1/cortex/* — own PID, own SQLite, own worker pool.

scripts.test:unit: if [ -d ./test/unit ]; then node --test --test-reporter=spec ./test/unit; else echo 'no unit tests for @botcoin/cortex-server'; fi

_fastifyNote: Production deployment should add: fastify@^4, @fastify/formbody. The current implementation uses node:http for zero-dependency bootstrap; Fastify is recommended for performance (see src/index.ts).
